mnemonics.title: LR Parser Actions
mnemonics.content: SRAE - Shift, Reduce, Accept, Error. These are the four possible actions in the ACTION table of an LR parser.

mnemonics.title: LR Parser Components
mnemonics.content: SIP - Stack, Input buffer, Parsing table. The three main components of every LR parser.

mnemonics.title: LR Parser Power Hierarchy
mnemonics.content: 0-S-LA-C (Zero to See LAC): LR(0) < SLR(1) < LALR(1) < CLR(1). Each type handles a progressively larger class of grammars.

mnemonics.title: Parsing Table Parts
mnemonics.content: ACTION handles terminals (shift/reduce/accept/error), GOTO handles non-terminals (state transitions after reductions). Remember: ACTIONs are for what you see, GOTOs are for what you produce.

mnemonics.title: LR(0) Item Dot Meaning
mnemonics.content: Left of dot = already SEEN. Right of dot = still EXPECTED. Dot at end = ready to REDUCE. Dot at start = nothing matched yet.
